mapper.select: SELECT id,tenant_id,provider_base_url_id,name,enabled,priority,weight,connect_timeout_ms,read_timeout_ms,remark,created_at,updated_at FROM provider_channel WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.sql: c.id, c.tenant_id, t.name AS tenant_name, p.id AS provider_id, p.name AS provider_name, c.provider_base_url_id, b.protocol, b.normalized_base_url, c.name, c.enabled, c.priority, c.weight, c.connect_timeout_ms, c.read_timeout_ms, c.remark, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM provider_credential cr WHERE cr.provider_channel_id = c.id AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL) AS credential_count, c.created_at, c.updated_at
FROM provider_channel c JOIN provider_base_url b ON b.id = c.provider_base_url_id JOIN provider p ON p.id = b.provider_id LEFT JOIN tenant t ON t.id = c.tenant_id
mapper.select: SELECT ORDER BY c.created_at DESC,c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT WHERE c.id=#{id} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND (#{platformAdmin}=TRUE OR c.tenant_id=#{tenantId})
mapper.update: UPDATE provider_channel SET provider_base_url_id=#{providerBaseUrlId},name=#{name},priority=#{priority},weight=#{weight},connect_timeout_ms=#{connectTimeoutMs},read_timeout_ms=#{readTimeoutMs},remark=#{remark},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_channel SET enabled=#{enabled},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_channel SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM provider_credential WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.enabled = TRUE) AS enabled, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.enabled = FALSE) AS disabled FROM provider_channel c WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND (#{platformAdmin}=TRUE OR c.tenant_id=#{tenantId})
